positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a whimsical forest scene silhouette at sunset. The foreground shows stylized, intertwined roots and delicate flora. In the background, simplified mountain ranges and abstract, glowing celestial bodies create depth. Use a strong, limited color palette: deep indigo, rich teal, and vibrant gold accents for the glowing elements. The overall style should be geometric and clean, like a modern woodcut illustration, designed for high contrast on apparel. Minimal detail, maximum symbolic impact. Studio lighting, vector quality, perfect symmetry.
negative: photorealism, logo, text, words, watermark, signature, blur, grainy, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, messy, messy lines
